zh.Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duitsland: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia van Berthout於1290年出生在比利時安特維爾梅倫時，她的父親Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES40歲，母親Mechtild van der Mark20歲。她於1311年1月11日與Reinoud II von Geldern在荷蘭利包格洛爾蒙德結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年5月6日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福享年39歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福。

zh-hans.Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Duitsland: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia van Berthout于1290年出生在比利时安特維爾梅倫时，她的父亲Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES40岁，母亲Mechtild van der Mark20岁。她于1311年1月11日与Reinoud II von Geldern在荷兰利包格洛爾蒙德结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年5月6日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福享年39岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia van Berthout was born in 1290, in Mechelen, Antwerp, Belgium, her father, Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES, was 40 and her mother, Mechtild van der Mark, was 20. She married Reinoud II von Geldern on 11 January 1311, in Roermond, Limburg, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died on 6 May 1329, in Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 39, and was buried in Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia van Berthout est née en 1290, à Mechelen, Anvers, Belgique, son père, Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mechtild van der Mark, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Reinoud II von Geldern le 11 janvier 1311, à Roermond, Limbourg, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1329, à Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia van Berthout 1290 in Mechelen, Antwerpen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES 40 und ihre Mutter Mechtild van der Mark 20. Sie hat am 11. Januar 1311 in Roermond, Limburg, Niederlande Reinoud II von Geldern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1329 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland und wurde in Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia van Berthout è nata il nel 1290 nel Mechelen, Anversa, Belgio, sua padre, Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Mechtild van der Mark, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Reinoud II von Geldern il 11 gennaio 1311, nel Roermond, Limburgo, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 6 maggio 1329, nel Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.Gelderland, Netherlands: オランダジェルダーランド
ja.Zutphen, Herzogtum Geldern, HRR: オランダジェルダーランドズトフン
ja.Mechelen, Antwerpen, België: ベルギーアントウエルペンメチェレン
ja.lifeSummary: Sophia van Berthoutが1290年にベルギーアントウエルペンメチェレンで生まれた時，父Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINESは40歳，母Mechtild van der Markは20歳であった。1311年1月11日にオランダリンブルグロールモンドでReinoud II von Geldernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年5月6日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブで39歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophia van Berthout(이)가 1290년 벨기에 앤트워펜 미셸에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mechtild van der Mark(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1311년 1월 11일 네덜란드 림버그 로몽에서 Reinoud II von Geldern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 5월 6일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia van Berthout nasceu em 1290, em Mechelen, Antuérpia, Bélgica, seu pai, Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mechtild van der Mark, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Reinoud II von Geldern em 11 de janeiro de 1311, em Roermond, Limburgo, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1329, em Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia van Berthout родилась в 1290 г. в местности мечелен, антвирпен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mechtild van der Mark, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reinoud II von Geldern 11 января 1311 г. в местности роирмонд, лимбург, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла 6 мая 1329 г. в местности клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia van Berthout nació en 1290, en Mechelen, Amberes, Bélgica, su papá, Floris BERTHOUT DE MALINES, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mechtild van der Mark, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Reinoud II von Geldern el 11 de enero de 1311, en Roermond, Limburg, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1329, en Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
